nasb.text: I will also turn My hand against you, And will smelt away your dross as with lye And will remove all your alloy.

esv.text: I will turn my hand against you and will smelt away your dross as with lye and remove all your alloy.

cnv.text: 我必把手轉過來攻擊你； 我要煉除你的渣滓，如同用鹼來煉一樣， 我要除去你的一切雜質。

ccb.text: 我必攻击你， 用碱炼净你的渣滓， 除尽你的杂质。

csbs.text: 我必转手对付你， 如同用碱炼净你的渣滓， 除尽你一切的杂质。
